message:
fix: reject non-regular-file paths in extension fs_op_read hostcall

fs_op_read() checked file size limits after fs::metadata() but never
verified the path was a regular file. Directories, symlinks to
directories, device files, etc. would pass the metadata check and then
fail with confusing errors or hangs. Add an is_file() guard that returns
InvalidRequest immediately for non-regular files, consistent with the
same guard added to ReadTool/EditTool/HashlineEditTool and
get_file_lines_async().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
